failedAssertions.reason: API returns valid metrics (winrate=0.43, profit_factor=1.07, sharpe=0.21, max_drawdown=-0.42) but FreqUI does not display them. Missing strategy_comparison key in backtest_result, exit_reason_summary entries lack exit_reason/profit_factor/expectancy fields, trades missing stake_amount/leverage fields. Timestamp/RangeError issues from round 1 are fixed.

Backend /api/v1/backtest/history/{filename}/market_change endpoint works (returns 200 with valid data), but FreqUI's internal getBacktestMarketChange call uses a different URL pattern and gets 404. Need to investigate FreqUI source (ftbot.ts) to find the exact URL pattern FreqUI expects and implement a matching route.

Partial progress from round 1: .split TypeError and RangeError (Invalid time value) are fixed. But 6 TypeErrors remain: Cannot read undefined.length (backtestMetrics, CandleChartContainer, BacktestingView), Cannot read undefined.map (BacktestingView x2), Cannot read undefined.forEach (index). Root causes: missing strategy_comparison array, incomplete trade fields (stake_amount/leverage), missing chart data structures, incomplete exit_reason_summary entries.
